title: Comment Exporter for YouTube™ — CSV
description: Chrome extension that exports the public comments on any YouTube video to CSV or JSON in one click, with a Pro unlimited-comments upgrade. No login, no server.
body_html:
Comment Exporter for YouTube™ adds a single “⬇ Export comments” button to the bottom-right of any YouTube watch page. Click it, and the extension auto-scrolls the page to lazy-load every top-level comment, reads each one, and downloads the result as a file — no login, no API key, and nothing uploaded to any server.

It runs entirely inside the YouTube tab you already have open. There is no YouTube API key, no OAuth consent screen, and no server operated by the developer: the extension reads the comment text, author name, like count, timestamp, and reply count that YouTube itself already renders on the page, formats them locally in your browser, and hands the file straight to your browser's own download flow. Your comment data never leaves your device.

What it does

  • Adds a floating “⬇ Export comments (N)” button to any YouTube watch page, with a live count of comments loaded so far.
  • Auto-scrolls the page to load comments before exporting, stopping once no new comments appear.
  • Captures author, comment text, like count, timestamp, and reply count for every top-level comment.
  • Free: export up to 200 comments per video as CSV (UTF-8, Excel-ready).
  • Pro ($6/month via ExtensionPay): unlimited comments per video, plus a JSON export option.
  • A toolbar popup shows your current Free/Pro plan and an upgrade or manage-subscription button.

How to use it

Install the extension, open any YouTube video, and look for the “⬇ Export comments” button in the bottom-right corner of the page. Click it to auto-scroll and load the comment section, then download a CSV (or JSON, on Pro) of everything captured. Free-tier exports that hit the 200-comment cap on a busy video show a one-time upgrade nudge; Pro removes the cap and unlocks JSON export.

Subscriptions are handled by ExtensionPay, a third-party payment processor, entirely on ExtensionPay's own checkout pages — this extension never sees or stores your payment details.

Install: Add Comment Exporter for YouTube™ to Chrome.

See the privacy policy for exactly what data this extension touches and where it goes.

Not affiliated with or endorsed by YouTube or Google. “YouTube” is a trademark of Google LLC.
